meta.title: Pillyway - Pilgrimage routes across Europe
meta.description: Find your next pilgrimage route. Plan stages, accommodations and sights along well-known and new caminos. Contribute your knowledge and help build Europe's most open pilgrimage database. Benefit from the experiences of other pilgrims and share the knowledge you have gained to help future pilgrims.

home.heading: Pillyway
home.hero_body_1: Explore historic caminos, remote pilgrimage paths and long-distance hiking routes all over Europe.
home.hero_body_2: Navigate stage by stage through your journey, discover towns, accommodations and sights along the way — and help build Europe's most open pilgrimage database.
home.community_body_1: Pillyway is a collaborative platform for pilgrims, hikers and long-distance travellers on foot.
home.community_body_2: Many pilgrimage routes outside Spain are poorly documented. Information on stages, accommodations and trail layouts is often scattered across countless websites, blogs and PDFs.
home.community_body_3: Pillyway brings this knowledge together in one central place — open, collaborative and accessible to all.
home.features_title: What you can do on Pillyway
home.feature_explore_body: Discover pilgrimage routes across Europe and navigate through every stage of your journey.
home.feature_accommodations_body: Find hostels, pilgrim lodgings, villages and important stops along the route.
home.feature_sights_body: Record churches, viewpoints, cafés, fountains and other interesting places along the way.
home.feature_contribute_body: Any registered user can improve existing caminos or create entirely new routes.
home.feature_verify_body: Routes confirmed by multiple pilgrims can be marked as verified — so others can rely on the information.
home.by_pilgrims_body_1: Pillyway grows through the experiences of real walkers.
home.by_pilgrims_body_2: Whether you've walked a famous camino or discovered a small regional pilgrimage route — your knowledge can help future pilgrims plan their own journey.
home.by_pilgrims_body_3: Together we build a living, open knowledge base for pilgrimage routes in Europe.
home.planned_intro: Pillyway is still under development. Planned features include:
home.join_body: Create an account, share your knowledge about pilgrimage routes and help make planning future pilgrimages easier.

caminos.title: Caminos
caminos.browse: Explore all caminos shared by the community here. Filter by verified caminos if you want to ensure the information is reliable.
caminos.loginInInfo: You can create your own caminos or improve existing ones by <link>logging in</link>.
caminos.empty: No caminos yet. Be the first to create one!
caminos.meta_title: Find new and verified caminos across Europe
caminos.meta_description: Here you can find proven and new pilgrimage routes in Europe. Filter by verified caminos or simply enter your own route to plan your next journey and share your knowledge with other pilgrims.
caminos.error_loading: Failed to load caminos. Please try again.
caminos.delete_dialog_body: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
caminos.delete_dialog_error: Failed to delete the camino. Please try again.
caminos.delete_dialog_error_forbidden: You are not authorized to delete this camino. Only the creator (within 2 hours of creation) or an administrator can delete it.

teaser.text: Missing a route you've always wanted to walk? Send us an email!
teaser.text_2: With AI support, we can quickly generate a new Camino.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.meta_description: Imprint and provider identification for Pillyway.
imprint.responsible_heading: Responsible for content pursuant to § 55 para. 2 RStV
imprint.liability_content_body_1: The content of this website has been created with the greatest possible care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or currency of the content.
imprint.liability_content_body_2: As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general laws pursuant to § 7 para. 1 TMG. According to §§ 8 to 10 TMG, however, we are not obligated as a service provider to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information.
imprint.liability_links_body: This website contains links to external websites of third parties, on whose content we have no influence. Therefore, we cannot assume any liability for this third-party content.
imprint.copyright_body_1: The content and works created by the site operators on these pages are subject to German copyright law.
imprint.copyright_body_2: Content posted by users remains the responsibility of the respective users.
imprint.ugc_body_1: Pillyway is a collaboratively maintained platform for pilgrimage routes and hiking information.
imprint.ugc_body_2: For user-created content, route descriptions, accommodations, trail recommendations or other information, we provide no warranty regarding:
imprint.ugc_body_3: Use of the information provided is at your own risk.
imprint.open_source_body_1: Pillyway is an open-source project released under the MIT licence.
imprint.open_source_body_2: The source code is publicly accessible.
imprint.contact_body: For questions, feedback or legal concerns, please contact:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.meta_description: Information on the processing of personal data on Pillyway.
privacy.intro: This privacy policy informs you about the nature, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data within the Pillyway web application.
privacy.general_body: We process users' personal data only to the extent necessary to provide a functional website and our content and services.
privacy.data_intro: When visiting and using Pillyway, the following data may be processed:
privacy.data_ugc: Content created by users (routes, comments, accommodations, etc.)
privacy.registration_body_1: Users can create an account to contribute content and edit existing content.
privacy.registration_body_2: Processing is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR to provide the platform's functions.
privacy.ugc_body_1: Content published by users on Pillyway may be publicly visible.
privacy.ugc_body_2: Please do not publish sensitive personal data within public content.
privacy.hosting_body_1: Pillyway uses Supabase as its hosting and database provider.
privacy.hosting_body_2: Personal data may be processed on Supabase's servers.
privacy.logs_body_1: When the website is accessed, information is automatically transmitted by the browser.
privacy.logs_datetime: Date and time of the request
privacy.logs_body_3: This data is used exclusively for the technical security and stability of the platform.
privacy.cookies_body_1: Pillyway uses technically necessary cookies and session data required for the operation of the platform.
privacy.cookies_body_2: These cookies are used, for example, for user login and authentication.
privacy.cookies_body_3: No advertising or marketing cookies are used.
privacy.legal_basis_intro: The processing of personal data is based on:
privacy.rights_intro: Under the GDPR, users have in particular the following rights:
privacy.rights_contact: Requests can be sent to the contact address above at any time.
privacy.retention_body: Personal data is stored only for as long as necessary for the respective purpose or as required by statutory retention obligations.
privacy.security_body: We implement technical and organisational measures to protect personal data against loss, manipulation and unauthorised access.
privacy.changes_body: This privacy policy may be updated if technical or legal requirements change.
privacy.contact_body: For questions about data protection, please contact:

tac.title: Terms and Conditions
tac.meta_description: Terms and conditions for the Pillyway platform.
tac.intro: These terms and conditions govern the use of the Pillyway web application. By using the platform, you agree to these terms.
tac.purpose_body_1: Pillyway is a collaborative platform for documenting, planning and improving pilgrimage and hiking routes in Europe.
tac.purpose_body_2: Content is created and maintained collaboratively by users.
tac.account_body_1: Certain features (e.g. creating and editing routes) require a user account.
tac.account_body_2: Users are obligated to keep their login credentials confidential.
tac.ugc_body_1: Users may publish content such as routes, stages, accommodations and sights.
tac.ugc_body_2: By posting content, users grant Pillyway a simple, unlimited licence to display and distribute that content within the platform.
tac.ugc_body_3: Users are solely responsible for the content they create.
tac.prohibited_intro: It is prohibited to publish content that in particular:
tac.prohibited_offensive: is insulting, discriminatory or glorifies violence
tac.prohibited_misleading: contains false or misleading information (e.g. intentionally incorrect routes)
tac.prohibited_spam: contains spam or advertising without authorisation
tac.no_warranty_intro: Content on Pillyway is created and maintained by users. We therefore provide no warranty for:
tac.no_warranty_body: Use of the information is at your own risk.
tac.verification_body_1: Routes can be marked as "verified" by the community when confirmed by multiple users.
tac.verification_body_2: Even verified content does not guarantee the actual walkability or safety of a route.
tac.moderation_body_1: Pillyway reserves the right to edit, move or remove content that violates these terms or is otherwise inappropriate.
tac.moderation_body_2: User accounts may be suspended for repeated violations.
tac.liability_body_1: Pillyway is only liable for damages caused by intentional or grossly negligent breach of duty.
tac.liability_body_2: Liability for the use of the content provided, in particular in connection with hiking or pilgrimage routes, is excluded to the extent permitted by law.
tac.changes_body_1: Pillyway reserves the right to amend these terms and conditions where necessary.
tac.changes_body_2: Users will be informed of significant changes.
tac.open_source_body: Pillyway is an open-source project released under the MIT licence. The source code is publicly available.
tac.contact_body: For questions about these terms and conditions, please contact:
